[← Back to Home](index.html){.back-button}

# Skills

## Technical
- Data Entry
- Microsoft Office Suite
- Graphic Design

## Professional
- Time Management
- Organizational Skills
- Productivity Management

## Interpersonal
- Team Leadership
- Team Motivation
- Quick Learner
- Reliable and Responsible

## Certifications
- Basic First Aider
- Psychosocial Supporter

## Availability
- Tuesday - Sunday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

## Languages

- [Language 1]: Fluent
- [Language 2]: Intermediate
